summary: F5 step 3-D server→client text frame inject CONFIRMED at WS layer (engine inject works end-to-end), but character.ai UI does NOT render it — envelope schema mismatch as predicted. Korean warning byte stream '⚠️ 민감정보가 포...' arrives at client exactly per spec (RFC 6455 MASK=0 server→client). character.ai's socket.onmessage unconditionally calls JSON.parse(event.data), throws SyntaxError on raw text, discards the message. From user perspective: silent disconnect (no chat bubble created). Mission protection RESTORED state from #666 HOLDS — no LLM PII regression. Next task: wrap warning in character.ai-specific JSON envelope.

engine_inject_at_ws_layer.evidence_quote: Uncaught SyntaxError: Unexpected token '⚠️', '⚠️ 민감정보가 포'... is not valid JSON at JSON.parse (<anonymous>) at socket.onmessage (_app-ff1aed95bc980787.js:1:456264)

ui_rendering.reason: character.ai client unconditionally calls JSON.parse(event.data) on every WS message and discards the parse error
ui_rendering.user_perspective: Message vanishes into silent retry loop — no chat bubble created

network.inject_frame_location: middle row contains the single inject frame

key_findings.1_engine_inject_proven_correct: F5 step 3-D server→client text frame inject mechanism is PROVEN. Engine successfully overrides _ai_prompt_block_response with plain text WS frame. Korean warning bytes reach client.
key_findings.2_ui_envelope_mismatch_as_predicted: character.ai UI requires JSON envelope wrap. Raw text frame is silently discarded by JSON.parse error handler. This is the PARTIAL outcome the request brief predicted.
key_findings.3_mission_protection_held: No LLM PII regression — engine block from #666 still holds. Connection closes cleanly + 3 retries blocked. Mission protection state RESTORED unchanged.
key_findings.4_next_task_clear: Wrap warning in character.ai-specific JSON envelope (likely {command: 'neo_error', ...} or {command: 'system_message', ...}) so client's onmessage parser routes it into chat bubble UI.

recommendation.primary_diagnosis: Engine inject mechanism is correct at WS protocol layer. character.ai UI compatibility requires service-specific JSON envelope (next task per request brief).
next_steps: Engine team: implement character.ai-specific JSON envelope wrap. Likely pattern: {command: 'neo_error' | 'system_message' | similar character.ai protocol command, content: '⚠️ 민감정보...'}. Inspect character.ai's normal error/system message frames to determine exact schema.
Continue current zlib inflate + block + (raw inject) build in production — mission protection is working, only UX gap remains
Consider applying same lesson to copilot (#663): JSON envelope wrap may be needed there too once engine inject path is fixed
Regression check: ensure normal character.ai chats still work (this fix only affects keyword-matched flows)
User-side: character.ai mission protection is solid; UX gap (silent disconnect) is acceptable interim state until JSON envelope wrap deployed
recommendation.mission_critical: No regression. Mission protection HELD from #666 success state.
recommendation.checklist_impact: F5 step 3-D ✅ partial verified (engine layer SUCCESS, UI layer needs envelope task). Pivot to F5 step 3-E or step 4 (JSON envelope wrap).
